creator: lah@ams.org
text:
The kdelibs3 dependency is there for databases/knoda.  I worked around 
the problem by removing the port.  However, it seems reasonable to fix 
the configure script or add something to the port so that it's marked 
BROKEN when kdelibs3 is installed.  It wouldn't work with KDE3 at all.

Any user could get into this mess by installing libreoffice then knoda 
and then trying to rebuild libreoffice later for an update.
